------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: How to add email ID, Fax and Phone number in billing...
entry.content:
To add custom fields in Billing Documents, please check the below KBAs: 

How to Extend a Custom Form Template for Billing Output with Custom Fields

2679030 - Extensibility for Billing Document Printout - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

3110331 - Ship-to party address on the billing document printout - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

2899660 - What is the CDS view to display plant address in the billing document printout - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

3011127 - Phone number and email address of contact person is not printed on the billing document output form - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Setting Year parameter to Data Action based on input control MMYYYY
entry.content:
Hi experts. 

In my story I have a Forecast layout table with an calculation input control for cut-over date. 

I have a Data_Action_1 which needs as parameter: 1.The result of the calculation input control . Why input control is not shown on selection options?

2. Year. This should be the same year as for calculation input control. For example if calculation input control is: Aug, 2023, then Year= 2023; if calculation input control is: Nov, 2024 , then Year=2024. 

Actually,  Data_Action_1 shows prompts for: calculation input control (Fecha Inicio Proyección) and year (Año Proyeccion). 

 

How can I pass year from calculation input control (Fecha Inicio Proyeccion) to Year parameter  (Año Proyeccion) ?

 

Thanks , please help!!

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... dri...
entry.content:
Hi Colin_F,  I'm running SQL Server 2019:

  • OLE to SQL Server works for me with V 18.6.5.0 of the 64 bit driver.
  • Also using a 64 bit DSN with the SQL Server Wire Protocol (version installed with CR 2020) works as well.
  • ODBC with 64 bit SQL Server Driver 18 works AOK.

Do the other (non-OLE) options listed above work for you?  One step when moving to 2020 from earlier versions is that DSNs must be moved to the 64 bit versions as well as do drivers and clients if applicable.

entry.title: Filter on Account Dimension in SAC Model or Story
entry.content:
Hi,
As the Account dimension in SAC Planning is not feasible, is there a way to restrict a range of GL Accounts in a SAC story or at the Planning model please?

I tried both in Optimized and Classic mode but in vain. 

Any insights are helpful.

Thanks,

Jothi

entry.title: How do I obtain the oOrders.Lines.VisualOrder property after adding a new order line DI API
entry.content:
I am adding a new order line ( AR Sales order - Item type)  and updating it.

I need to obtain the newly added line ( Lines.VisualOrder ) as soon as I have added.

I would prefer to do this without having to do a SQL query.  Any tips are appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to request an Enhancement for SAP Security?
entry.content: Are you able to connect to an SAP user group such as DSAG or ASUG? They may have influence or insights.

entry.title: Re: About Workarea Folder Structure in SAP Enable Now for Simulations & In-App Content
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

No, you should not let the content under the Unsorted folder grow; this will ultimately lead to performance issues with your Enable Now system.  It's good that you are structuring the content under the Content folder but that entire structure should be moved out and placed into the actual content structure.

You are unlikely to use a similar structure for in-app help, assuming that you mean SAP Companion, because the vast majority of your content creation and management occurs through the SAP Companion interface.  I would move all SAP Companion content objects, such as Guided Tours and Context Help content, out of the Unsorted folder and place it into a content structure but you don't need to worry about the Creation vs Published level for this type of content.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP AIF Index table always stores first occurrence of...
entry.content:
The error message "Use a different index table for single selection; 010 field" indicates you have wrongly maintained the same table in field Message Idx Table (/AIF/CUST => Define Namespace-Specific Features => Define Interface-Specific Features) as the concerned multiple index table.

You should either leave it empty (then the default /AIF/STD_IDX_TBL will be used) or maintain your own single-index table in field Message Idx Table (/AIF/CUST => Define Namespace-Specific Features => Define Interface-Specific Features).

entry.title: Intermittent CSS(Cascading Style Sheet) not applied to BTP standalone AppRouter when redirecting 403
entry.content:
Dear,

While I'm testing AppRouter with Spring-boot Java application in BTP, I met an issue as below and so please check it. 

I setup redirecting page for "403" error in AppRouter(xs-app.json)  and also configured it to call CSS to beautify the error page.

When redirecting 403 errorPage in BTP standalone AppRouter, the CSS intermittently is not applied to the error page.

How can I debug it to cope with this sympthom ?

Please let me know if you need more information for the understanding.

entry.title: Re: Enable SAP Companion in SAP Concur - SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Emmanuel,

Firstly, SAP Companion in Concur should look exactly the same as SAP Companion in Fiori because it's the same code that provides the SAP Companion interface and functionality.

SAP Companion must be turned on in Concur; individual customers must request that this done. 

I have seen Concur systems with the menu that you mention but it is another DAP, not SAP Companion.  Did you request that SAP Companion be turned on by generating the link to your SAP Companion configuration in Manager and adding it to a Concur support ticket with the type User Assistant / Tools.  Make sure that you include the URL of your SAP Companion configuration in the ticket and list the Concur systems(s) that it should be turned on in.

It's not wise to turn on the SAP Companion editor within the SAP Companion configuration in Manager, particularly once that configuration is used in a Production system, but as a test to see if it really is Companion, turn on the editor within the configuration in Manager and then refresh Concur.  If it is your configuration, the pencil should appear.

Hope this helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...

entry.title: Re: SEN Bookpage Tracking
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you turned on tracking for the Simulation modes that must be tracked in the Workarea Playback Settings.  The Playback Settings for every mode of Simulation to be tracked should be set to the following settings and then Playback Settings then synchronized to Manager and published.

Regards
Shane

entry.content:

Our performance year runs from July - June. We will upgrade to the latest goals for the next performance cycle with a new performance template. Our Development Plan template has ongoing goals, and rolls through without the requirement for a new template each year.  Can I confirm that when I convert the Development Plan template our employees will retain and be able to edit their existing goals? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Cloud for Customer specific Configurations for Partner Channel Management
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Partner Portal is not supported anymore.

Please kindly use your own portal instead.

Thanks and Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: We don't expose the author or last change date for example. However if you expose the CDS View as an API you can get the field properties programmatically using the $metadata OData method as I mentioned above. Have a look also at 35D (https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/35D?region=DE). You can also look into extended the data model with Developer Extensibility (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53b14a3c9f7d4837a9c1f271ee3b24a4/e86da62802f54212b2a255efb0224937.html?locale=en-US). But I think this will not help you with the Author or Last Changed info for the CDS View itself. If you describe your end goal/business requirement that you are trying to achieve, we may be able to provide some other guidance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Application Interface Framework - Collected Developer Blogs
entry.content:
hello , Great Blog , thanks for sharing .

i have a situation to partially process the records in payload and rest mark as error, which needs to reprocess later in AIF .. question : how to edit a value in payload via ABAP code ? is there any existing BADI / FM / Class which can do this ? thanks for sharing .. SNK

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: If this option is selected then when you first record a simulation, all Practice bubbles will be positioned in the center of the screen. Authors can still move them; it's just a default. And changing this setting after recording won't magically move them - it's only used at the time of recording (which is why it's in Authoring Settings > Recording...).

entry.title: Re: Simulation SAP Enable Now
entry.content: I see, thanks for your explanation!

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - How to use Filter component in examples
entry.content:
Hi, I tried the filter expression with $(property.???} and it always comes back with the error. 

org.apache.camel.builder.xml.InvalidXPathExpression: Invalid xpath: /ArrayList/item[iFlowName = ${property.iflowname}]. Reason: javax.xml.xpath.XPathExpressionException: net.sf.saxon.trans.XPathException: expected "<name>", found "{", cause: net.sf.saxon.trans.XPathException: expected "<name>", found "{"

Please help.... Thanks

Here is my filter expression. 

and here is my xml. 

<ArrayList>
<item>
<iFlowName>Flow-2</iFlowName>
<retryFrequency>5</retryFrequency>
<retryMaxCount>55</retryMaxCount>
</item>
<item>
<iFlowName>Flow-1</iFlowName>
<retryFrequency>5</retryFrequency>
<retryMaxCount>55</retryMaxCount>
</item>
</ArrayList>

entry.title: Dollar sign formating not showing in front
entry.content: When click to show sign in formula formatting, the dollar sigh is appearring behind of the amount and not in front of the amout. How can format it to show in fron of the amount

entry.title: Re: COGI BAPI
entry.content: You can set up a batch job to run the program CORUPROC / CORUAFWP at defined frequency. For CORUAFWP , you can specify a plant and storage location and save a variant, then set up a batch job with the program and variant (T-code: SM36). For CORUPROC , you can save a variant and set up a batch job (T-code: SM36).

entry.title: What is the best way to add Functional Locations to the EPPM Revenue Projects?
entry.content:
Could we organise our company projects according to the Functional locations? Will this make any sense? If not what is the purpose of having this field in the Projects ? My POV is from the S4HANA Public Cloud perspective.

Will you create a hierarchy of the "Functional Locations" according to the delivering company departments structure or according to the Customers projects location?

entry.title: About checking Standard price
entry.content:
Hi expert.

Is there a way to check whether the standard price used in posting confirmation for production order is the standard price released in this month?

Thank you.

entry.title: SF Employee Central Contingent Worker End Date error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using Contingent Worker functionality in EC. We have a contingent worker record with work order end date of March 8th, 2024. On top of this record we have rehired them as full time employee with effective date of March 17th, 2024. Now when we try to update the work order end date from March 8th to March 15th, we are getting an error - Employment Information : Before rehiring an employee, you must dissociate existing employment information.

We have tried updating the work order end date via UI and Imports but getting the same error.

We tried the same scenario in another instance and its working properly there.

Any inputs/insights are appreciated!

entry.title: How can I access my APP when it is deployed on the BTP platform
entry.content: I deployed my project to BTP platform by cf push command, and it has been successful. But I want to access my project in BTP, I found my deployed app in application, but I don't know how to access it. I found a url under Application Routes, but the page cannot be accessed after opening. I don't know whether my operation is correct? Please tell me how to access my app correctly.Thank you！

entry.title: Implications of the TLS change on the SAP Linux servers
entry.content:
Does your current version of S4 HANA support TLS 1.2 and are there any changes that need to be done within the application if we change the TLS settings on the Server hosting the S4 HANA application?

If we change the SSL version to support SSL 3.0 and above within the server OS, would there be any changes and impact on the S4 HANA application ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Implications of the TLS change on the SAP Linux servers
entry.content:
Yes, the current version of S4 HANA does support TLS 1.2. TLS is widely used for communication and data transfer over a network. If you change the TLS settings on the server hosting the S4 HANA application, there should not be a significant impact on the application itself.

In term of SSL 3.0, it is largely outdated and prone to certain types of security vulnerabilities. As such, to uphold the highest level of data security, it is strongly recommended to use the latest version of TLS instead of SSL 3.0.

If you decide to configure your server to use SSL 3.0, you might face compatibility issues or possible communication errors with some clients or services which do not support outdated SSL protocol. You would also potentially be placing your data at risk due to the outdated security of SSL 3.0.

entry.title: What is Basic data 2?
entry.content: What is Basic data 2?

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I just tried again whole processes, from the beginning - create a new trial account in BTP, then create a destination in BTP, finally connect to BAS, and don't find an error. It works. I checked the configuration in your screen shot and also didn't find an error. Can you check if you upload the newest Trust in Cloud System which is downloaded from BTP destination?

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Release strategy for po
entry.content:
Hi,

You may control the authorization for release codes via auth object M_EINK_FRG.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Getting started with Agile for SAP - 8 steps to success
entry.content:
The success factor for agile is adoption: if you feel you will fail to reach 80/90% adoption rate when moving from waterfall methodology, then you can look at Wagile methodology: https://cloudcoach.com/blog/what-is-wagile-project-management/

These is an intermediate methodology where the business need, personas, use cases is collected in agile mode, while keeping the testing, delivery, documentation in waterfall mode.

these can be a 2-5 years period to convince business people of the value of agile methodology.

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Creating a Custom Migration Object: SAP QM Certificate Profile

entry.title: Re: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content: Yes, the difference will be there in 3rd decimal, if the quantity is less. However, the difference in 3rd decimal is not relevant when you use a 2 decimal currency!

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi

  In Outgoing Payment when user clicks on Add it goes for Approval. We want when user checks in Approval Status report if it is approved then it should not allow the user to send it again for approval. As of now user can send it for approval.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to refresh ALV Data in SALV on Click Event.
entry.content:
Hey @Sandra_Rossi Please find my Code Complete below.

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Class (Implementation) lcl_data
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_data IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD get_data.
SELECT a~belnr,
a~bstat,
b~company_code,
b~fiscal_year,
b~posting_date,
b~document_date,
b~document_type
FROM bkpf AS a
INNER JOIN zfit_cashjournal AS b
ON a~belnr = b~document_number
INTO TABLE @rt_data
WHERE a~bstat = 'V'
AND b~zdoth_tdr_no = @space
AND b~company_code = '1000'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
SORT rt_data BY belnr.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM rt_data COMPARING belnr.
ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.

METHOD process_data.
gt_tdrdisp = it_data.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Form display
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& text
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& --> p1 text
*& <-- p2 text
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
FORM display.
*Create alv object.
TRY.
CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory
IMPORTING
r_salv_table = lo_gr_alv
CHANGING
t_table = gt_tdrdisp.
CATCH cx_salv_msg.
ENDTRY.

lo_gr_alv->set_screen_status( pfstatus = 'ZINTTDRS'
report = sy-repid
set_functions = lo_gr_alv->c_functions_all
).
lr_selections = lo_gr_alv->get_selections( ).
lr_selections->set_selection_mode( if_salv_c_selection_mode=>row_column ).

lo_gr_functions = lo_gr_alv->get_functions( ).
lo_gr_functions->set_all( abap_true ).

* Fit the columns
lo_columns = lo_gr_alv->get_columns( ).
lo_columns->set_optimize( abap_true ).

lo_columns = lo_gr_alv->get_columns( ).

"events
gr_events = lo_gr_alv->get_event( ).
CREATE OBJECT event_handler.
SET HANDLER event_handler->user_command FOR gr_events.

* Display alv
lo_gr_alv->display( ).

ENDFORM.
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Class (Implementation) lcl_handel_events
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_handel_events IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD user_command.

DATA: gt_final TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zfit_cashjournal.

SELECT *
FROM zfit_cashjournal
INTO TABLE gt_final.

gt_rows = lr_selections->get_selected_rows( ).

CASE e_salv_function.
WHEN 'GTDR'.
IF gt_rows IS INITIAL.
MESSAGE 'Please Select atleast one document' TYPE 'I' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
ELSE.
TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_docgen,
document_number TYPE zfit_cashjournal-document_number,

company_code TYPE zfit_cashjournal-company_code,
fiscal_year TYPE zfit_cashjournal-fiscal_year,
item TYPE zfit_cashjournal-item,
fund TYPE zfit_cashjournal-fund,
receipt_key TYPE zfit_cashjournal-receipt_key,
doc_num TYPE char5,
END OF ts_docgen.


DATA: lt_docgen TYPE TABLE OF ts_docgen.
LOOP AT gt_rows INTO DATA(gs_rows) .
READ TABLE gt_tdrdisp INTO gs_tdrdisp INDEX gs_rows.
APPEND gs_tdrdisp TO gt_temp.
ENDLOOP.


SELECT document_number,
company_code,
fiscal_year,
item,
fund,
receipt_key
FROM zfit_cashjournal
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @gt_temp
WHERE document_number = @gt_temp-belnr
INTO TABLE @lt_docgen.

* LOOP AT gt_temp INTO gs_temp.
LOOP AT lt_docgen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_docgen>).
<fs_docgen>-fund = <fs_docgen>-fund(1).
<fs_docgen>-receipt_key = <fs_docgen>-receipt_key(1).
* APPEND gs_docgen TO gt_final.
ENDLOOP.

DATA(lt_temp_gen) = lt_docgen.
SORT lt_temp_gen BY fund receipt_key.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_temp_gen COMPARING fund receipt_key.

DATA: lv_document_number TYPE char5.


LOOP AT lt_temp_gen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_temp_gen>).
CLEAR : lv_document_number.

CALL FUNCTION 'NUMBER_GET_NEXT'
EXPORTING
nr_range_nr = '01'
object = 'ZFI_INTTDR'
* QUANTITY = '1'
* SUBOBJECT = ' '
* TOYEAR = '0000'
* IGNORE_BUFFER = ' '
IMPORTING
number = lv_document_number
* QUANTITY =
* RETURNCODE =
EXCEPTIONS
interval_not_found = 1
number_range_not_intern = 2
object_not_found = 3
quantity_is_0 = 4
quantity_is_not_1 = 5
interval_overflow = 6
buffer_overflow = 7
OTHERS = 8.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
<fs_temp_gen>-doc_num = lv_document_number.
ENDIF.

LOOP AT lt_docgen ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_gen>).
IF <fs_gen>-fund(1) = <fs_temp_gen>-fund(1)
AND <fs_gen>-receipt_key(1) = <fs_temp_gen>-receipt_key(1).
<fs_gen>-doc_num = lv_document_number.
ENDIF.

UPDATE zfit_cashjournal SET zdoth_tdr_no = <fs_gen>-doc_num
WHERE document_number = <fs_gen>-document_number
AND item = <fs_gen>-item
AND fiscal_year = <fs_gen>-fiscal_year.
ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.
MESSAGE 'Internal TDR Created for the Selected Documents' TYPE 'I' DISPLAY LIKE 'S'.

* BREAK-POINT.
* ENDLOOP.
lo_gr_alv->refresh( refresh_mode = if_salv_c_refresh=>full ).
ENDIF.
WHEN 'BACK'.
LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.
* WHEN 'REFRESH'.
*
* lo_gr_alv->get_selections( ).
* lo_gr_alv->refresh( ).
ENDCASE.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Change of valuation category - What is the best approach?
entry.content:
I understand valuation category of materials for which orders/batches exists cannot be changed until the orders and batches are archived and deleted.

I have around 20000 materials in plant 1001. These materials are also present in multiple plants. The requirement is to have "Batch SPLIT valuation" in only plant 1001. The rest of the plants don't need any change. What is the best approach to achieve this?

1. Create new materials for all 20000 materials and extend it to all plants (and create new master data for BOMs, Routings as well)?

OR

2. Create a new plant (Let's say Plant 1002) and extend the existing materials to this new plant and change valuation category to "X" (Batch Split Valuation)?

entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content: The field MATNR is protected in standard only , also i have filled all bapi parameters correctly according to bapi_salesorder_change example , like updateflag etc...

entry.title: Re: FMS not working correctly
entry.content:
Hi,

The FMS trigger works with UI only. That means when user opens PO screen and have the condition change, then FMS will work. Remember to click Add/Update button to save. After that, you can query the data from table.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

This looks like a great initiative and I will love to be a part of it, 

I Identify as a person in the below categories:

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • First generation college students

 

Thanks for your time

entry.title: Re: Reclassification of Quantity and Unit of Measure | SA...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. Is it possible to create a new field in ACDOCU table for maintaining Group Quantity, in the same manner as we have the fields for Amount in LC, Amount in GC and Quantity?

entry.title: Re: Setting Year parameter to Data Action based on input...
entry.content:
@mayiya 

Fecha Inicio Proyección This one can be set using the Input control. make sure the parameter is set as below

Also the formula input control should return Date format of SAC which is YYYYMM. 

 

For Año Proyeccion you can set it with an input control which returns YYYY

Alternatively you can use scripting to set the parameter values on a button click and then set it to execute. In scripting you have more control to manipulate the string parameters.

Br.

Nikhil

Regards
Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Ledger Setup in S/4HANA Public Cloud for country India
entry.content: Please remove tag FIN General Ledger

entry.title: Re: Transaction Type Intercompany - AW01N issue
entry.content: Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance.

All the best

What is the question?

entry.title: How to export the inspection characteristics data in routings in mass?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please help me with exporting the inspection characteristics data in routings in mass? Is there any standard way to achieve this?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to export the inspection characteristics data in...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING;v=0002 to export the inspection characteristics of a routing in mass. 
Please refer to the Help Portal for more details.

BR
SAP Product Support

entry.title: User without global accounts associated in SAP BTP Cockpit - trial

I want configure Mail Server from SAP Build Lobby. Whenever I click on OPEN IN BTP COCKPIT, below message is displayed (see screenshot).:

Can anyone tell me how to resolve this issue. 

CUSTOM IAS TENANT is showing me this.

How do i resolve this issue ?

  SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: how to do accrual posting with auto reverse in cloud sap
entry.content:
Hi Vignesh,

With which app did you make the postings?

entry.title: Re: SAP WM Stock Removal Strategy M (Small/Large Quantity)
entry.content:
Hello @dicksonjyl 

Great blog post by dicksonjyl on the SAP WM Stock Removal Strategy M! The detailed explanation and step-by-step demonstration make it easier for readers to understand the functionality and master data settings involved in implementing this strategy. Here are some comments and insights:

Clear Explanation The author provides a clear and concise introduction to the stock removal strategy M in the SAP WM module. The core meaning and purpose of the strategy are well-explained, making it accessible for both beginners and experienced SAP users.

Key Configuration Points The three key points highlighted for setting up this strategy – specifying the stock removal strategy, configuring storage type search, and maintaining control quantity in material master data – are crucial for users looking to implement the strategy. The specific details and emphasis on configuration steps add practical value to the blog.

Step-by-Step Demonstration The inclusion of a step-by-step demonstration with screenshots from the SAP system is highly beneficial. It provides a visual guide for users to follow along, enhancing the learning experience and making it easier to grasp the concepts discussed.

Use of Specific Examples The use of specific storage types (005 and Z03) and batch numbers (0000000467) in the demonstration adds practicality to the blog. It helps readers relate the information to real-world scenarios, making it more engaging and applicable to their own SAP projects.

Effective Use of Terminology The author uses SAP-specific terminology effectively, catering to an audience familiar with SAP S/4HANA and LE Warehouse Management. This ensures that the content is relevant and targeted to the right audience.

Relevance to SAP S/4HANA 1909 The mention that the blog is based on the SAP S4/HANA 1909 system is helpful for readers to understand the context and relevance of the information. It also signals that the content may be subject to updates or changes in future SAP versions.

Overall, this blog post provides valuable insights into the SAP WM Stock Removal Strategy M, and the author's expertise shines through in the detailed explanations and practical examples. It serves as a great resource for those looking to enhance their understanding of SAP WM functionalities.

Best Regards

entry.title: migrating solman 7.2 from SQL to HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our current version of solman is 7.2 SP16 running on AZURE with windows OS and MYSQL database.

abap and java ( Already its dual stack split system)

Now are planning to migrate our existing version of solman system to UNIX OS and HANA database.

 

Do we have any standard procedure for migrating the solman from windows/sql to unix/PERSON_NAME ???  i couldn't find any standard guide in SAP portal .

Also not sure if we should be using SWPM tool or SUM DMO for this type/scenario of OS DB migration were target is PERSON_NAME DB ? could you please comment on this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: migrating solman 7.2 from SQL to HANA
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

For explanation on Solution Manager 7.2 migration procedure, please see SAP Community blog https://blogs.sap.com/2016/05/04/simplified-upgrade-and-migration-to-sap-solution-manager-72/ and SAP Note 2345636 as well. 

Indicate that both SWPM tool or SUM DMO(for ABAP part) are supported. Following guide would help:

  1. SUM DMO( http://support.sap.com/sltoolset )
    1. SAP Note 3296402 for DMO with SUM 1.1 SP 02
    2. Guides for DMO with SUM 1.1 SP 02
  2. SWPM
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/SOFTWARE_PROVISIONING_MANAGER/30839dda13b2485889466316ce5b39e9/baf86558573d43faa20068ec39751efb.html

Best regards,
Sylas
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content: SAP

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content: SAP ご担当者様 お世話になっております。 櫻井です。 確認いただきありがとうございます。 すみません、検索する名前を間違えていました。 再度確認しました。 >LISTCUBEで検索しようとしたオブジェクトZA01CMI0005はCCLM Object一覧にありますか。 →添付しましたように、ZA01CMI0005もObject一覧にありませんでした。 またLISTCUBEでZA01CM005もヒットしませんでした。 お忙しいところ恐縮ですがよろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: IDoc DEBMAS07 - how to update KNVV-LIFSD (delivery block) with blank value
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to update KNVV-LIFSD of customer accounts with valid values, for example XX in IDoc DEBMAS under segment E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM.

Then I want to clear the delivery block for some accounts. So what I do is I populate the field LIFSD as blank under E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM. However, it gives me the error "Field KNVV-LIFSD . is not an input field"

Does anyone know how to clear KNVV-LIFSD with IDoc?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
Re: 通过采购订单购置固定资产起息日逻辑问题
entry.content:
客户您好，

具体的资产起息日您可以参照Help Portal: 资产会计日期 。

如果还有哪里您不太清楚，您可以提供做账时日期的截图和journal entry中日期的截图。

Best Reagrds,

Evelyn

entry.title: Re: How to define JSON Array as top level object in SAP P...
entry.content: Answering quite late, incase some one stumbles upon this post, the root node can be removed later on channel , using config in the receiver adapter module parameters  setIgnoredElements with ParameterValue "rootnode name". This should work.

entry.title: Re: How to execute actions or function imports in remote OData services from Steampunk
entry.content:
Hello Bernhard,

First very thanks for your prompt response.

I will check this and update.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Rotational Week off
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Right now only a particular day week off is available in the timesheet in SuccessFactors. But there are employees who can take 1week off or 2 week off in a week whenever they want to.

For e.g. one employee is having week off on Monday, but he decided to work on Monday & take week off on Tuesday. Then in that case he is having rotational week off as work schedule. But we are not having the option of rotational week off in time sheet. Is it possible to configure this so that employee can take weekly off whenever they want to. We need to create a roster that allows managers to have rotating weekly offs for their teams. This scenario is very common in all retail/call center companies.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Signavio -...
entry.content: I have been preparing for taking the SAP Signavio associate certification by Mar 31st 2024. But now I find that Signavio certifications C_SIG_3301 has been retired and the proposed successors C_SIGDA and C_SIGPM do not appear in list of valid certifications. This is a business requirement for me to complete the certification before 31st March. Can you please suggest and help how to get the SAP Signavio certified immediately.

entry.title: While importing termination details the supervisor does not get updated in system
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

In SuccessFactors once manager will get terminated from the system, the Reportees under him will get directly assigned to the next level manager if manager is choosing transfer direct Reportees.

While importing termination details the supervisor does not get updated in system.

Can we check the feasibility of the same ,so by importing termination details of supervisor the reportees under him will get directly assigned to the next level manager.

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Insights into Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management: Why, What and How
entry.content:
Image generated with AI (DALL·E 3)

If cybersecurity risk in the supply chain is the potential for harm or compromise that arises from the cybersecurity risks posed by suppliers, their supply chains, and their products or services, Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management – or C-SCRM for short, is the process of identifying, assessing and mitigating risks in an organization's supply chain for Information and Communications Technology (ICT) products and services that could impact the security and integrity of an organization's products, services and operations.

As per the National Institute of Standards and Technology, Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management is at the intersection of information security and supply chain management:

 

Why should organizations care about C-SCRM?

 

Long story short: because risk factors continue to increase and are more diverse.

These include external malicious actors of course, but also internal personnel threat, vulnerabilities in product and component development, gaps in physical security, influence from foreign ownership that may not align with the company’s best interest, compliance and legal requirements in relations to counterfeit or non-conforming products, but also evolving sanctions or lists of prohibited suppliers just to name a few.

As a matter of fact, there is a strong realization that root causes for this risk are significant:

Increased dependency on 3rd party vendors, complexity of supply chains & lack of transparency

98% have been affected by a cybersecurity breach in their supply chain (BCG, 2023)

Sophistication of attackers and compromised partners

90% believe they are at risk of a supply chain attack and think vetting software suppliers is a critical activity, but only 33% actually do (NIST, 2021)

Vulnerable code and implanted backdoors

633% year on year increase in malicious software supply chain attacks in 2022 (BCG, 2023)

 

Rapidly evolving regulatory landscape

 

To protect companies and customers many countries and economic regions decided to release guidance to be followed and, in some cases, to give an extra “push”, to issue regulatory requirements. And 2024 will be an eventful year for Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management on that front!

Illustration of select C-SCRM requirements in Australia, Europe and United States

 

Who should be concerned?

 

Let’s start answering this question by the industries in scope of Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management recommendations.

And there are many!

 

In no particular order, the following industries have been namely mentioned in at least one of the sources listed at the bottom of this blog:  Energy, Education, Transport, Financial Services, Health and Medical, Space Technology, Grocery and Food (production, processing and distribution), Water (drinking and waste/sewage), Defence, Communications, Digital Infrastructure (DNS, data centres, storage, Cloud computing), Information and Communications Technology Service, Public Administration, Postal Service, Chemicals, Manufacturing (medical devices, computer and electronic products, electrical equipment, motor vehicles), Research… and more!

In essence, every industry where there is an ICT component in the product or service being delivered is in scope. Just think of your wearable device or your connected coffee maker!

Contrarily to a widespread misconception, Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management isn’t restricted to large companies. Small and medium-sized enterprises are increasingly becoming the target of supply chain attacks.

 

What steps should you consider?

 

If your company is in an industry listed just above – or if you just want to ensure the integrity, security, quality and resilience of your supply chain and your products and services, you may decide to implement a Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management approach.

Stakeholder engagement

For it to be successful, representatives or at least 3 stakeholders should be involved in designing the approach:

  • Sponsorship by Executive Leadership (ex: CEO, CIO, COO, CFO, CISO, CTO, etc.)
  • Decision making by Business Management (ex: Program and Project Management, R&D and Engineering, Procurement, and Quality Assurance, etc.)
  • End-users/prescribers’ advice from Operational Management (ex: Architects, Developers, System Owners, Quality Assurance, etc.)

Best practice framework

Once the Governance is defined, then comes the choice of the standard. There are of course different frameworks that can be leveraged, but the 2 major ones have been issued by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) and by the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA):

NIST:

 

 

 

ENISA:

 

“Blended” summary:

Context and Scope

o   Identify suppliers & assess criticality

o   Identify business objectives, risk appetite, and risk tolerance

o   Document threat sources and vulnerabilities

 

Assess

o   Assess supply chain cybersecurity risks

o   Determine exposure of enterprise operations

o   Prioritizing risks for mitigation

 

Respond

o   Make and document decisions

o   Implement management, operational, and technical controls

o   Document contingency plans

 

Monitor and Review

o   Monitor risks against appetite and tolerance

o   Monitor effectiveness of risk responses

o   Document and track incidents (and resolution)

o   Screen suppliers

o   Audit for compliance

 

 

What benefits can you expect?

 

Key benefits that organizations implementing a Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management approach can achieve include:

  • Reduced likelihood of supply chain compromise
  • Operational and enterprise efficiencies
  • Greater assurance of quality and reliability of products acquired
  • Greater assurance of supplier trustworthiness

In summary, a sound Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management would help strengthen the supply chain and address risks that can occur at all steps:

Examples of risks in the Design-to-Operate process

What about you, has you company already implemented a Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management approach? If so, what insights would you share with peers looking at doing the same? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

 

Additional sources:

Should you want to read more about this topic, I would suggest the following sources:

  • Cybersecurity SCRM Fact Sheet, National Institute of Standards and Technology
  • Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management Practices for Systems and Organizations (SP 800-161r1), National Institute of Standards and Technology
  • Case Studies in Cyber Supply Chain Risk Management, Observations from Industry – Summary of Findings and Recommendations, National Institute of Standards and Technology
  • Key Practices in Cyber Supply Chain Risk Management: Observations from Industry (IR 8276), NIST
  • Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 14 December 2022 on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, European Union
  • Good Practices for Supply Chain Cybersecurity, European Union Agency for Cybersecurity
  • Identifying Cyber Supply Chain Risks, Australian Signals Directorate
  • Management of Cyber Security Supply Chain Risks, Australian National Audit Office
  • Supply Chain Cyber Security, New Zealand National Cyber Security Centre
  • Strengthening and Enhancing Cyber capabilities by Utilizing Risk Exposure Technology Act, Congress USA
  • Federal Acquisition Supply Chain Security Act, Management and Budget Office USA
  • Improving the Nation's Cybersecurity, Executive Office of the President USA
  • Supply Chain Risk Management Framework, Office of the Secretary of Defense USA
  • Supply Chain Cybersecurity: 3 Future Advances, Gartner

entry.title: Re: Convert Analytical Dataset to Analytical Model without impacting consumers (external tools like
entry.content:
Great idea @hector_andres_garcia .

I don't know why we cannot have a datasource replace functionality in SAC even after all these years.

entry.title: Employee status for the notice period employees should get changed to Serving notice period
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

In system if employee is in his notice period , until his last working day his/her employee status shows "Active".

So those are serving notice period, for them the employee status should get changed to "Serving notice period" instead of  "Active" in job information automatically. 


Thank you.

entry.title: Employee unable to withdraw resignation after final approval from approvers
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Can employee withdraw resignation after final approval of the workflow is done in SuccessFactors?

For example- Employee initiated resignation. It got approved by the approvers. Then employee wants to withdraw resignation after final approval. But he is unable to do so, only Admin can do it.

entry.title: Can we attach separate content for contributors for Exit mail in Manage Email configuration
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Can we attach separate content for contributors for Exit mail in Manage Email configuration.

For example- When employee is initiating resignation- The mail is triggering to HR, Manager & all the No Dues clearance Spocs. But the content is same because we have kept them as a contributors so even if there is no approval the mail will trigger to all the contributors. As a system standard now we only can send one content to all the Contributors. Is there any feasibility of sharing different male to different contributors of the work flow.

entry.title: Leave accrual for employee who initiated Resignation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

If an employee is getting terminated/ separated from system in mid of the month, then only till that month leave should get encashed. Annual leave is getting accrued 15 days at a bulk in the first month of the year. So while employee is initiating his resignation , the same balance is getting shown in employee profile. Is it possible to show the balance on the basis of the month when he will resign, because his balance is getting accrued in the first month of the year itself.

For example- If employee is initiating his resignation on October, then till October whatever will be the leave balance for annual leave(9 days) only that will get shown in employee profile in termination page, not 15 days.

entry.title: No dues alert not triggering
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

There are few Contributors for No dues workflow. When the separation of the employee will get initiated, No dues alert will get trigger to the Contributors & in Home Page they will be able to view the Alert to initiate the No dues for the particular employees.

We have tried to achieve the same through Alert but no alert is getting triggered. Is there any feasibility on the same?

entry.title: How to add field in Billing Document UI from Sales order UI using Adaptation UI in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have created a Custom field in Sales Document Item and enabled in Business Scenerios "Sales Document to Billing Document on Item Level" and "Sales Document to Delivery from Item to Header Level". Please find the attached screenshot for your reference.

Now my requirement is:

1. I want the custom field which is created in sales order item UI to get added in Billing Document and Outbound delivery UI.

2. And the value which I enter in sales order screen should automatically be visible in the Billing Document and Outbound delivery.

Thanks in advance.

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: SAC系统账号
entry.content:
Hi liyaoguang，

   请联系你这个SAC 系统的管理员， 谢谢！ 

William

entry.title: Re: Raw materials planning in HANA, FG planning/schedulin...
entry.content:
Hello Swathi, 

 

This functionality is part of standard S/4 HANA Planning with PPDS. Have you gone through this help document?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f899ce30af9044299d573ea30b533f1c/aa35c95360267514e10000000a174cb4.html?version=2022.000&q=

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Filter on Account Dimension in SAC Model or Story
entry.content:
Hi jyothirmayee_s, 

  Account dimension in table widget doesn't support filter by range yet. Instead, you can filter on account in table by select member, parent node, or property. 

William

entry.title: Re: WebUI in ChaRM - How to change field label?
entry.content: I have added tag "CRM WebClient UI" to help this question. Thank you.

entry.title: In Analytics stories, How one should copy canvas created ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am creating analytics stories & I have created canvas to display some charts. I would like to copy that canvas, but I am not able to do. I can see the option copy/duplicate, but it is greyed out.

Thanks,
Abhishek
